title: The Monkey Talks
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, René Fauchois, Elizabeth Pickett
actors: Olive Borden, Jacques Lerner, Don Alvarado
plot: A bankrupt circus act plans to revive its fortunes by disguising a diminutive acrobat as a talking chimpanzee. Things go awry when the acrobat falls in love with a beautiful tightrope-walker.
